textPlain: Wait, Lutnick said tariffs would lower the prices, this can't be real.
Don't worry I'm sure once Trump berates the ceos of these companies on his social media platform they will stop raising prices

Do we have a better source?El País’ “ideology has been defined by a leaning towards Europeanism, progressivism, and social liberalism.…In the late 1970s and 1980s, El País had close connections with the Spanish Socialist Workers' Party (PSOE)” [1].[1] https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/El_Pa%C3%ADs

https://www.npr.org/2025/08/21/nx-s1-5509592/walmart-tariff-...> On Thursday, Walmart CEO Doug McMillon said his company's costs keep climbing: "We've continued to see our costs increase each week, which we expect will continue into the third and fourth quarters," he said on an earnings call.

I did a Google search for “retailers raising prices because of tariffs” and the link below was the first result. Seriously, do you really think that retailers are just going to eat the cost of tariffs for the next three years?https://www.businessinsider.com/companies-raising-prices-inc...
